content:
Just a silly minor bug that probably occurred while implementing the new phantasmal dive changes.

Normally, Uvhash has "Blood Frenzy" stacks equal to a percentage of his max hp, so his intention will not change if you don't deal enough damage to remove all Blood Frenzy stacks.

Now, it seems that Uvhash only receives 1 stack of "Blood Frenzy", so dealing any damage at all will cause his intention to change and his dialogue line to appear (very annoying when you hit multiple times)
thread_title: Uvhash boss is bugged in phantasmal dive

thread_title: Regarding Absolute axiom (+12) on limited characters

content:
To both tease a highly controversial mechanic and release it despite literally the entire fanbase asking you not to speaks volumes 

do not think that just because you *had* goodwill with us means you can do this

your consumers won’t let you get away with this and I hope your revenue going down will be a good wake up call to all this
thread_title: Regarding Absolute axiom (+12) on limited characters

content:
While as a fellow developer, I know that a patch canmot be taken out in the matters of a few days as development plan and version controls are usually done months in advance.

But unless we get some form of communication on the direction and plans of morimens or confirmation of non predatory behavior or even the removal of absolute axiom down the line.

There is currently nothing else but deteriorating good will.

So please issue to us a proper statement.
thread_title: Regarding Absolute axiom (+12) on limited characters

content: BIAV just make roadmap instead of this current update annoucement cycle already BIAV...
thread_title: Regarding Absolute axiom (+12) on limited characters

content: I 100% agree with everything that was said here. I spent a good amount of money on this game as I enjoyed my time with the game but after the announcement of this absolute axiom, I didn't buy the pre order pack BECAUSE of absolute axiom being announced. And if this continues, and after the silent treatment and a few other mistakes, I will not trust any "we won't overdo it, promise" statements. I will stop spending money completely as much as I love the game in general. But this needs to be removed 100% for limited awakaners. +12 giving +10 level cap is an enough nice bonus/boost

content:
Hello! I think I encountered a bug in Phantasmal Dive where after Leigh used her rouse, her shield would infinitely respawn + reset to the full 529k at every turn end, *regardless* of how much damage was done... At one point I finally managed to break the shield but it just reset again (and before doing 132k damage)

The health damage shown was only from Dorsain's **pierce damage attack** and the fight lasted **16 turns** before giving up<:takenotes:1357186646294138890>  

(Note that I was trying Xu too, so I'm unsure if potentially the poison at turn end was triggering her shield to respawn? But it only got to 23k stacks, no where near the 132k...)
thread_title: Leigh boss shield bug in Phantasmal Dive?

content:
新命輪故事中的“你”一直是同一個，而被問者顯然是徐，那是不是該用女性的“妳”字呢？
雖然知道這大概率是繁簡直接轉化造成的結果，但還是希望能夠修復使之通順易懂。

content: 简体字中“你”并不区分性别，但是之前游戏的官方语言不是繁体吗

content:
那個啊
命輪前三段後三段是互相對應的
所以總共是三個不同的人(
